title: PortSwigger: Template Injection

Web Security Academy
Server-side template injection
Server-side template injection
This technique was first documented by PortSwigger Research in the conference presentation
Server-Side Template Injection: RCE for the Modern Web App
.
In this section, we'll discuss what server-side template injection is and outline the basic methodology for exploiting server-side template injection vulnerabilities. We'll also suggest ways of making sure that your own use of templates doesn't expose you to server
impact: Attacker could exploit sql injection vulnerability
